title: Public Awareness of and Trust in Official Statistics 2024
body: "This report presents findings from the Northern Ireland Continuous Household Survey on public awareness of the Northern Ireland Statistics and Research Agency (NISRA) and trust in official statistics produced by NISRA. The questions were asked between September and November 2024.  The report also monitors changes in attitudes to official statistics over time and provides comparisons with public attitudes to the Office for National Statistics (ONS), where appropriate. "
